debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
inst✝ : UnitalFreeStateTheory ι
i : ι
ρ : MState (H i)
ε : Prob
hε : 0 < ε ∧ ε < 1
σ : (n : ℕ) → ↑IsFree
ε' : Prob
hε'₁ : 0 < ε'
hε'₂ : ε' < ε
hR1R2 : @SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε < @SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ
hR1 : @SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε ≠ ⊤
hR2 : @SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ ≠ ⊤
ε₀ : ℝ := (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ - @SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε).toReal * (↑ε - ↑ε') / (1 - ↑ε)
hε₀ : 0 < ε₀
hε₀' : ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε) ≤ ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ) + ε₀
m : ℕ
hm : m ≥ 1 ∧ 𝐃(statePow ρ m‖↑(σ m)) / ↑m < @SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ + ↑⟨ε₀, ⋯⟩
σ₁ : MState (H i)
hσ₁_pos : σ₁.m.PosDef
hσ₁_free : IsFree σ₁
«σ̃» : (n : ℕ) → MState (H (i ^ n)) := fun n => @SteinsLemma.Lemma6_σn ι inst✝ i m σ₁ (↑(σ m)) n
σ_max_exists : ∀ (n : ℕ), ∃ x ∈ IsFree, IsMaxOn (fun σ => OptimalHypothesisRate (statePow ρ n) ε {σ}) IsFree x
«σ⋆» : (n : ℕ) → MState (H (i ^ n)) := fun n => Classical.choose ⋯
σ' : (n : ℕ) → MState (H (i ^ n)) := fun n => ⟨2 / 3, ⋯⟩[⟨1 / 2, ⋯⟩[«σ̃» n↔«σ⋆» n]↔statePow σ₁ n]
σ'_free : ∀ (n : ℕ), IsFree (σ' n)
σ'_posdef : ∀ (n : ℕ), (σ' n).m.PosDef
mineig : ℝ := ⨅ i_1, ⋯.eigenvalues i_1
h_min_pos : 0 < mineig
h_min_le_one : mineig ≤ 1
c : ℕ → ℝ := fun n => Real.log (1 / mineig) + Real.log 3 / ↑(max n 1)
hc : ∀ (n : ℕ), 0 < c n
hc_lim : Filter.Tendsto (fun n => c n / ↑n) Filter.atTop (nhds 0)
f : ℕ → ℝ → ℝ := fun n lam => ↑⌈Real.log lam / c n⌉ * c n
h_le_f : ∀ (n : ℕ) (lam : ℝ), Real.log lam ≤ f n lam
h_f_le : ∀ (n : ℕ) (lam : ℝ), f n lam < Real.log lam + c n
σ''_unnormalized : (n : ℕ) → HermitianMat (H (i ^ n)) ℂ := fun n => (↑(σ' n)).cfc fun e => Real.exp (f n e)
σ''_unnormalized_PosDef : ∀ (n : ℕ), (↑(σ''_unnormalized n)).PosDef
h_exp_f : ∀ (n : ℕ) (x : ℝ), 0 < x → x ≤ Real.exp (f n x) ∧ Real.exp (f n x) < Real.exp (c n) * x
σ''_tr_bounds : ∀ (n : ℕ), 1 ≤ (σ''_unnormalized n).trace ∧ (σ''_unnormalized n).trace < Real.exp (c n)
σ'' : (n : ℕ) → MState (H (i ^ n)) :=
  fun n => { M := (σ''_unnormalized n).trace⁻¹ • σ''_unnormalized n, zero_le := ⋯, tr := ⋯ }
σ''_posdef : ∀ (n : ℕ), (↑↑(σ'' n)).PosDef
σ'_le_σ'' : ∀ (n : ℕ), Real.exp (-c n) • ↑(σ' n) ≤ ↑(σ'' n)
σ''_le_σ' : ∀ (n : ℕ), ↑(σ'' n) ≤ Real.exp (c n) • ↑(σ' n)
ℰ : (n : ℕ) → CPTPMap (H (i ^ n)) (H (i ^ n)) ℂ := fun n => pinching_map (σ'' n)
hσ'n_eq_sum_third : ∀ (n : ℕ), ↑(σ' n) = (1 / 3) • ↑(«σ̃» n) + (1 / 3) • ↑(«σ⋆» n) + (1 / 3) • ↑(statePow σ₁ n)
hσ₁_le_σ' : ∀ (n : ℕ), (1 / 3) • ↑(statePow σ₁ n) ≤ ↑(σ' n)
hliminf :
  Filter.liminf (fun n => 𝐃(statePow ρ n‖σ' n) / ↑n) Filter.atTop =
    Filter.liminf (fun n => 𝐃((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n)‖σ'' n) / ↑n) Filter.atTop
«hσ''_ge_σ⋆» : ∀ (n : ℕ), ↑(σ'' n) ≥ (Real.exp (-c n) / 3) • ↑(«σ⋆» n)
«hσ''_ge_σ̃» : ∀ (n : ℕ), ↑(σ'' n) ≥ (Real.exp (-c n) / 3) • ↑(«σ̃» n)
hσ''_ge_σ₁ : ∀ (n : ℕ), ↑(σ'' n) ≥ (Real.exp (-c n) / 3) • ↑(statePow σ₁ n)
hc_littleO : (fun n => c n + Real.log 3) =o[Filter.atTop] fun x => ↑x
hliminf_le :
  Filter.liminf (fun n => (OptimalHypothesisRate ((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n)) ε {σ'' n}).negLog / ↑n) Filter.atTop ≤
    ↑(ENNReal.toNNReal (@SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε))
hlimsup_le :
  ∀ (ε1 : Prob),
    0 < ↑ε1 ∧ ↑ε1 < 1 →
      Filter.limsup (fun n => (OptimalHypothesisRate ((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n)) (1 - ε1) {σ'' n}).negLog / ↑n)
          Filter.atTop ≤
        ↑(ENNReal.toNNReal (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ) + ⟨ε₀, ⋯⟩)
P1 : ℝ → (n : ℕ) → HermitianMat (H (i ^ n)) ℂ :=
  fun ε2 n =>
    (Real.exp (↑n * (ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε) + ε2)) • ↑(σ'' n)).proj_le ↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))
P2 : ℝ → (n : ℕ) → HermitianMat (H (i ^ n)) ℂ :=
  fun ε2 n =>
    (Real.exp (↑n * (ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ) + ε₀ + ε2)) • ↑(σ'' n)).proj_le
      ↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))
hPcomm : ∀ (ε2 : ℝ) (n : ℕ), Commute ↑(P1 ε2 n) ↑(P2 ε2 n)
hliminfP1 :
  ∀ (ε2 : NNReal),
    0 < ε2 → Filter.liminf (fun n => (P1 (↑ε2) n).inner ↑((fun n => (ℰ n) (statePow ρ n)) n)) Filter.atTop ≤ 1 - ↑ε
hlimsupP2 :
  ∀ (ε2 : NNReal),
    0 < ε2 →
      ∀ (ε1 : Prob),
        0 < ↑ε1 ∧ ↑ε1 < 1 →
          Filter.limsup
              (fun n =>
                ((Real.exp (↑n * (↑(ENNReal.toNNReal (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ) + ⟨ε₀, ⋯⟩) + ↑ε2)) •
                          ↑(σ'' n)).proj_le
                      ↑((fun n => (ℰ n) (statePow ρ n)) n)).inner
                  ↑((fun n => (ℰ n) (statePow ρ n)) n))
              Filter.atTop ≤
            1 - ↑(1 - ε1)
hlimsupP2' : ∀ (ε2 : ℝ), 0 < ε2 → Filter.limsup (fun n => (P2 ε2 n).inner ↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))) Filter.atTop = 0
E1 : ℝ → (n : ℕ) → HermitianMat (H (i ^ n)) ℂ := 1 - P1
E2 : ℝ → (n : ℕ) → HermitianMat (H (i ^ n)) ℂ := P1 - P2
E3 : ℝ → (n : ℕ) → HermitianMat (H (i ^ n)) ℂ := P2
Esum : E1 + E2 + E3 = 1
hE1proj :
  ∀ (ε2 : ℝ) (n : ℕ),
    E1 ε2 n =
      (↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))).proj_lt
        (Real.exp (↑n * (ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε) + ε2)) • ↑(σ'' n))
hE2leProj :
  ∀ (ε2 : ℝ) (n : ℕ),
    E2 ε2 n ≤
      (↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))).proj_lt
        (Real.exp (↑n * (ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ) + ε₀ + ε2)) • ↑(σ'' n))
hE1leq :
  ∀ (ε2 : ℝ) (n : ℕ),
    0 < ε2 →
      (↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))).inner
          (@SteinsLemma.HermitianMat.mul_commute (H (i ^ n)) (FinH (i ^ n)) ((1 / ↑n) • E1 ε2 n)
            ((↑((pinching_map (σ'' n)) (statePow ρ n))).log - (↑(σ'' n)).log)
            (@SteinsLemma.commute_aux✝ (H (i ^ n)) (FinH (i ^ n)) (DecEqH (i ^ n)) n
              (ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε) + ε2) (E1 ε2 n) ↑((pinching_map (σ'' n)) (statePow ρ n))
              ↑(σ'' n) ⋯ ⋯)) ≤
        (↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))).inner ((ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R1✝¹ ι inst✝ i ρ ε) + ε2) • E1 ε2 n)
hE2leq :
  ∀ (ε2 : ℝ) (n : ℕ),
    0 < ε2 →
      (1 / ↑n) • ↑(E2 ε2 n) * (↑(↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))).log - ↑(↑(σ'' n)).log) ≤
        (ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ) + ε₀ + ε2) • ↑(E2 ε2 n)
c' : ℝ → ℕ → ℝ := fun ε2 n => max (c n + c n / ↑n) (ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ) + ε₀ + ε2)
hc' : ∀ (ε2 : ℕ → NNReal), (∀ (n : ℕ), ε2 n < 1) → ∃ C, ∀ᶠ (n : ℕ) in Filter.atTop, c' (↑(ε2 n)) n ≤ ↑C
hσ'' : ∀ (ε2 : ℝ) (n : ℕ), Real.exp (-↑n * c' ε2 n) • 1 ≤ ↑(σ'' n)
ε2✝ : ℝ
n✝ : ℕ
ε2 : ℝ
n : ℕ
hε2 : 0 < ε2
hlog : 0 ≤ ↑(↑(σ'' n)).log - ↑(Real.exp (-(↑n * c' ε2 n)) • 1).log
⊢ Commute (↑(E3 ε2 n)) (↑(↑(σ'' n)).log - ↑(Real.exp (-(↑n * c' ε2 n)) • 1).log)

proof:
apply Commute.sub_right
              · symm
                apply IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc
                · apply HermitianMat.H
                symm
                dsimp [E3, P2]
                simp only [HermitianMat.proj_le, HermitianMat.cfc_toMat]
                apply IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc
                · apply HermitianMat.H
                apply Commute.sub_left
                · exact pinching_commutes (ρ⊗^S[n]) (σ'' n)
                · apply Commute.smul_left
                  exact Commute.refl _
              · symm
                apply IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc
                · apply HermitianMat.H
                symm
                apply Commute.smul_right
                apply Commute.one_right
failed_attempts:
apply Commute.sub_right
              · dsimp [E3, P2]
                simp only [HermitianMat.proj_le, HermitianMat.cfc_toMat]
                apply IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc
                · apply HermitianMat.H
                · apply (IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc (HermitianMat.H _) _).symm
                  symm
                  apply Commute.sub_left
                  · exact pinching_commutes (ρ⊗^S[n]) (σ'' n)
                  · apply Commute.smul_left
                    exact Commute.refl _
              · apply (IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc (HermitianMat.H _) _).symm
                apply Commute.smul_right
                apply Commute.one_right

apply Commute.sub_right
              · apply Commute.symm
                apply IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc (σ'' n).M.H
                apply Commute.symm
                dsimp [E3, P2, HermitianMat.proj_le]
                apply IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc
                · apply HermitianMat.H
                · apply Commute.sub_left (pinching_commutes (ρ⊗^S[n]) (σ'' n))
                  apply Commute.smul_left (Commute.refl _)
              · apply Commute.symm
                apply IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc (IsSelfAdjoint.smul (by simp) (IsSelfAdjoint.one _))
                apply Commute.symm
                apply Commute.smul_right (Commute.one_right _)
            apply Matrix.PosSemidef.smul (by positivity)
            apply Matrix.PosSemidef.mul_of_commute comm_aux2 (HermitianMat.proj_le_nonneg _ _) hlog

apply Commute.sub_right
              · rw [HermitianMat.log, HermitianMat.val_eq_coe, HermitianMat.cfc_toMat, HermitianMat.log, HermitianMat.val_eq_coe, HermitianMat.cfc_toMat]
                apply IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc
                · exact (σ'' n).M.H
                apply Commute.symm
                rw [E3, P2, HermitianMat.proj_le, HermitianMat.val_eq_coe, HermitianMat.cfc_toMat]
                apply IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc
                · apply HermitianMat.H
                apply Commute.sub_left
                · exact pinching_commutes (ρ⊗^S[n]) (σ'' n)
                · apply Commute.smul_left
                  apply Commute.refl
              · apply Commute.symm
                apply IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc
                · apply Matrix.IsHermitian.smul Matrix.IsHermitian.one (Real.exp_pos _).le
                apply Commute.smul_right
                apply Commute.one_right
            rw [← Matrix.PosSemidef.mul_of_commute comm_aux2]
            · exact smul_nonneg (by positivity) hlog
            · rw [← HermitianMat.zero_le_iff, E3, P2, HermitianMat.proj_le]
              exact HermitianMat.cfc_nonneg (fun x => by split <;> norm_num)
          _ = (c' ε2 n) • (E3 ε2 n).toMat := by
            simp [HermitianMat.log_val]
            rw [Real.log_exp, neg_mul, sub_eq_add_neg, neg_add_rev, neg_neg]
            simp only [smul_smul]
            congr 1
            field_simp

simp only [E3, P2, HermitianMat.proj_le, HermitianMat.cfc_toMat, HermitianMat.log]
              apply Commute.sub_right
              · apply IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc
                · apply HermitianMat.H
                · apply Commute.symm
                  apply IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc
                  · apply HermitianMat.H
                  · apply Commute.symm
                    apply Commute.sub_left
                    · exact pinching_commutes (statePow ρ n) (σ'' n)
                    · apply Commute.smul_left
                      apply Commute.refl
              · apply Commute.symm
                apply IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc
                · apply HermitianMat.H
                · apply Commute.symm
                  apply Commute.smul_right
                  apply Commute.one_right
            apply (mul_le_mul_iff_left (by positivity : 0 < 1 / (n : ℝ))).mpr
            apply HermitianMat.mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hlog (HermitianMat.proj_le_nonneg _ _) comm_aux2.symm

apply Commute.sub_right
        · simp only [E3, P2, HermitianMat.proj_le, HermitianMat.log, HermitianMat.cfc_toMat]
          apply IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc
          · exact HermitianMat.H _
          apply IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc
          · apply IsSelfAdjoint.sub
            · apply IsSelfAdjoint.smul
              · exact HermitianMat.H _
              · simp
            · exact HermitianMat.H _
          apply Commute.sub_left
          · apply Commute.smul_left
            apply Commute.refl
          · exact (pinching_commutes _ _).symm
        · simp only [HermitianMat.log, HermitianMat.cfc_toMat]
          apply IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc
          · apply IsSelfAdjoint.smul
            · exact IsSelfAdjoint.one _
            · simp
          apply Commute.smul_right
          apply Commute.one_right

apply Commute.sub_right
              · dsimp [E3, P2, HermitianMat.proj_le]
                apply IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc
                · apply IsSelfAdjoint.sub
                  · apply HermitianMat.H
                  · apply IsSelfAdjoint.smul
                    · simp
                    · apply HermitianMat.H
                symm
                dsimp [HermitianMat.log]
                apply IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc
                · apply HermitianMat.H
                symm
                apply Commute.sub_left
                · exact pinching_commutes (ρ⊗^S[n]) (σ'' n)
                · apply Commute.smul_left
                  exact Commute.refl _
              · dsimp [HermitianMat.log]
                apply IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc
                · apply IsSelfAdjoint.smul
                  · simp
                  · apply IsSelfAdjoint.one
                apply Commute.smul_right
                exact Commute.one_right _

apply Commute.sub_right
              · apply IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc (σ'' n).M.H
                symm
                dsimp [E3, P2]
                simp only [HermitianMat.proj_le, HermitianMat.cfc_toMat]
                apply IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc (HermitianMat.H _)
                apply Commute.sub_left
                · exact pinching_commutes (ρ⊗^S[n]) (σ'' n)
                · apply Commute.smul_left
                  apply Commute.refl
              · apply IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc (HermitianMat.H _)
                apply Commute.smul_right
                apply Commute.one_right

apply Commute.sub_right
            · simp only [E3, P2, HermitianMat.proj_le, HermitianMat.cfc_toMat]
              apply IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc
              · exact IsSelfAdjoint.sub (HermitianMat.H _) (HermitianMat.H _)
              · exact HermitianMat.H _
              symm
              apply IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc
              · exact IsSelfAdjoint.sub (HermitianMat.H _) (HermitianMat.H _)
              · exact HermitianMat.H _
              symm
              apply Commute.sub_left
              · symm
                apply IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc
                · exact HermitianMat.H _
                · exact HermitianMat.H _
                symm
                exact pinching_commutes (ρ⊗^S[n]) (σ'' n)
              · apply Commute.smul_left
                apply Commute.refl
            · apply IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc
              · exact HermitianMat.H _
              · exact HermitianMat.H _
              apply Commute.smul_right
              apply Commute.one_right
          rw [mul_comm] at comm_aux2
          rw [← comm_aux2.mul_sub_left_distrib]
          apply mul_nonneg
          · apply HermitianMat.proj_le_nonneg
          · exact hlog
        _ = (c' ε2 n) • (E3 ε2 n).toMat := by
          simp only [HermitianMat.log_smul_one_eq_log_smul_one, HermitianMat.toMat_one, smul_eq_mul,
            Matrix.mul_one, Real.log_exp, neg_mul, neg_neg]
          simp only [nsmul_eq_mul, smul_mul_assoc, mul_smul_comm, Matrix.mul_one, smul_smul]
          congr
          field_simp

dsimp only [E3, P2, HermitianMat.proj_le]
              rw [HermitianMat.cfc_toMat, HermitianMat.cfc_toMat, HermitianMat.cfc_toMat]
              apply Commute.sub_right
              · apply IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc (σ'' n).M.H
                symm
                apply IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc
                · apply HermitianMat.H
                · apply Commute.sub_left (pinching_commutes _ _)
                  apply Commute.smul_left (Commute.refl _)
              · symm
                apply IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc (HermitianMat.H _)
                apply Commute.smul_right (Commute.one_right _)
            rw [smul_mul_assoc]
            apply smul_nonneg (by positivity)
            apply Matrix.PosSemidef.mul_of_commute
            · exact HermitianMat.proj_le_nonneg _ _
            · exact hlog
            · exact comm_aux2

apply Commute.sub_right
              · have h_comm : Commute (E3 ε2 n).toMat (σ'' n).M.toMat := by
                  dsimp [E3, P2, HermitianMat.proj_le]
                  apply IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc (by apply HermitianMat.H)
                  apply Commute.sub_left
                  · exact pinching_commutes (ρ⊗^S[n]) (σ'' n)
                  · apply Commute.smul_left
                    exact Commute.refl _
                exact (IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc (by apply HermitianMat.H) h_comm.symm).symm
              · exact (IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc (by apply HermitianMat.H) (Commute.smul_right (Commute.one_right _) _).symm).symm
            refine (comm_aux2.mul_posSemidef_of_posSemidef ?_ ?_).left
            · apply HermitianMat.proj_le_nonneg
            · rwa [sub_nonneg]
          _ = (c' ε2 n) • (E3 ε2 n).toMat := by
            simp only [HermitianMat.log, HermitianMat.cfc_smul_id, Real.log_exp, nsmul_eq_mul]
            rw [HermitianMat.val_eq_coe, smul_mul_assoc, mul_neg, neg_mul, inv_mul_cancel_left₀]
            · exact mul_comm _ _
            · exact mod_cast (pos_iff_ne_zero.mp (by order))

apply Commute.sub_right
              · apply Commute.symm
                apply IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc (σ'' n).M.H
                apply Commute.symm
                dsimp [E3, P2, HermitianMat.proj_le]
                apply IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc (HermitianMat.H _)
                apply Commute.sub_left
                · exact pinching_commutes (ρ⊗^S[n]) (σ'' n)
                · apply Commute.smul_left
                  exact Commute.refl _
              · apply Commute.symm
                apply IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc (HermitianMat.H _)
                apply Commute.symm
                apply Commute.smul_right
                exact Commute.one_right _
            apply (HermitianMat.mul_nonneg_of_commute _ _ comm_aux2).mpr
            · constructor
              · rw [HermitianMat.zero_le_iff]
                apply HermitianMat.proj_le_nonneg
              · exact hlog
            · exact (HermitianMat.sub _ _).H
            · exact (HermitianMat.proj_le _ _).H

apply Commute.sub_right
              · have h_comm : Commute ((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n)).M.toMat (σ'' n).M.toMat := pinching_commutes _ _
                have h_comm_diff : Commute ((ℰ n (statePow ρ n)).M - (Real.exp (n * ((R2 ρ σ).toReal + ε₀ + ε2)) • (σ'' n).M)).toMat (σ'' n).M.toMat := by
                  apply Commute.sub_left h_comm
                  apply Commute.smul_left (Commute.refl _)
                have h_E3 : Commute (E3 ε2 n).toMat (σ'' n).M.toMat := by
                   dsimp [E3, P2, HermitianMat.proj_le]
                   apply IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc (HermitianMat.isHermitian _) h_comm_diff
                apply IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc (HermitianMat.isHermitian _) h_E3.symm
              · apply Commute.smul_right; apply Commute.one_right
            apply Matrix.PosSemidef.mul_of_commute
            · apply (HermitianMat.proj_le_nonneg _ _).toMat.smul
              positivity
            · exact hlog
            · apply Commute.smul_left comm_aux2

apply Commute.sub_right
              · have h : Commute (E3 ε2 n).toMat (σ'' n).M.toMat := by
                  simp only [E3, P2, HermitianMat.proj_le]
                  apply IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc (HermitianMat.H _)
                  apply Commute.sub_left
                  · apply Commute.smul_left
                    exact Commute.refl _
                  · exact pinching_commutes (ρ⊗^S[n]) (σ'' n)
                rw [HermitianMat.log]
                exact (IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc (HermitianMat.H _) h.symm).symm
              · simp only [HermitianMat.log, HermitianMat.cfc_const_mul_id]
                apply Commute.smul_right
                apply Commute.one_right

apply Commute.sub_right
            · symm
